title: Sounds X Ars Nouveau
description: Replaces break, fall, hit, place, and step sound ids for Ars mod and Ars Add-ons
body:
This resource pack uses [Sounds](https://modrinth.com/mod/sound) mod sound definitions to replace the default sounds of many blocks, allowing for more immersive gameplay experience.

Replaces break, fall, hit, place, and step sound ids for:

[Ars Nouveau](https://modrinth.com/mod/ars-nouveau)

**Blocks**
- Archwood planks, stairs, slabs, button, fence, fence gate, pressure plate, sign, trapdoor, grate, and sconce
- Blue, green, purple, and red logs, stripped logs, wood, and stripped wood 
- Blue, green, purple, and red leaves and saplings
- All regular & smooth gilded sourcestone, stairs, and slabs
- All source links
- All relays
- All turrets
- Scryer's Oculus
- Scry Crystal
- Arcane Platform
- Magelight Torch
- Arcane Core
- Imbuement Chamber
- Enchanting Apparatus
- Ritual Brazier
- Arcane Pedestal
- Planarium
- Display Case
- Spell Sensor
- Containment Jar
- Potion Jar
- Source Jar
- Void Prism
- Wixie Cauldron
- Source Gem Block
- Source Gem Lamp

**Items**
- All spellbooks
- All tokens
- All charms
- All arrows
- All enchanter's equipment
- All essence
- All rings
- All amulets
- All belts
- All potion flasks
- All scrolls
- All spawn eggs
- Arcanist's set
- Sorceror's set
- Battlemage's set
- Both warp scrolls
- Both focus
- Both jars
- Wilden drops
- Annotated Codex
- Wixie Hat
- Alchemist's Crown
- Greater Experience Gem
- Experience Gem


Ars Elemental
- Flashing archwood logs
- Flashing archwood stripped logs
- Paper-like items

[Ars Additions](https://modrinth.com/mod/ars-additions/versions)
- Warp Indecx
- Stabilized Warp Index
- Handy Haversack
- Advanced Dominion Wand
- Wayfinder
- Memory Crystal
- Charm of Emderward
- Charm of Second Wind
- Charm of Unhielding Magic
- Charm of Featherlight
- Charm of Ocean's Breath
- Charm of Ender Serenity
- Charm of Void's Salvation
- Charm of Resonant Shield
- Charm of Decay's End
- Charm of Gilded Friendship
- Charm of Darkvision
- Charm of Snowstride
- Wixie's Enchanting Apparatus
- Ender Source Jar

- Jar
- Paper-like

StarbuncleMania
